narrative:
Ames Township has 857 registered voters, with 49.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 34.9%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 18.8 percentage points.
